verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: The Hour has drawn near, and the moon has been split open!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةًۭ يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌۭ مُّسْتَمِرٌّۭ
verses.text: Yet if they see a sign, they turn away, and say, ‘Non-stop magic!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍۢ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
verses.text: They call (it) a lie, and follow their (own vain) desires, yet everything is set.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.text: Certainly enough of the story has come to them to act as a deterrent –

verses.quran_arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَٰلِغَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: far-reaching wisdom (it is) – but warnings are of no use.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ نُّكُرٍ
verses.text: So turn away from them. On the Day when the Caller will call to a terrible thing:

verses.quran_arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌۭ مُّنتَشِرٌۭ
verses.text: with sight downcast, they will come forth from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

verses.quran_arabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌۭ
verses.text: rushing to the Caller. The disbelievers will say, ‘This is a hard day!’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌۭ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
verses.text: The people of Noah called (it) a lie before them, and they called Our servant a liar, and said, ‘A man possessed!’ He was deterred

verses.quran_arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌۭ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.text: and called on his Lord: ‘I am overcome. Help (me)!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍۢ مُّنْهَمِرٍۢ
verses.text: So We opened the gates of the sky with water pouring (down),

verses.quran_arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًۭا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.text: and made the earth gush forth with springs, and the water met for a purpose already decreed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍۢ وَدُسُرٍۢ
verses.text: We carried him on a vessel of planks and nails,

verses.quran_arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءًۭ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.text: running before Our eyes – a payment for the one who was disbelieved.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَٰهَآ ءَايَةًۭ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We left it as a sign, yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَلَقَدْ تَرَكْنَاهَا آيَةً فَهَلْ مِنْ مُذَّكِرٍ
competing_variants.variant_english: And We have already left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember? (recited with an unassimilated dhāl)
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ رَجُلاً، سَأَلَ الأَسْوَدَ فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ أَوْ مُذَّكِرٍ فَقَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ يَقْرَؤُهَا ‏{‏فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}‏ قَالَ وَسَمِعْتُ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَقْرَؤُهَا ‏{‏فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}‏ دَالاً‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Abu 'Is-haq:A man asked Al-Aswad, 'is it 'Fahal min-Muddakir' or'..Mudhdhakir?" Al Aswad replied, 'I have heard `Abdullah bin Masud reciting it, 'Fahal-min Muddakir'; I too, heard the Prophet (ﷺ) reciting it 'Fahal-min-Muddakir' with 'd[omitted from the original translation: al']

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَلَقَدْ تَرَكْنَاهَا آيَةً فَهَلْ مِنْ مُذَّكِرٍ
competing_variants.variant_english: And We have already left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى، حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ إِسْرَائِيلَ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنِ الأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، قَالَ قَرَأْتُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَهَلْ مِنْ مُذَّكِرٍ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏{‏فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated `Abdullah:I recited before the Prophet (ﷺ) 'Fahal-min-Mudhdhakir'. The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "It is Fahal-min Muddakir

verses.quran_arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: How were My punishment and My warnings?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌۭ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: ‘Ād called (it) a lie. How were My punishment and My warnings?

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍۢ مُّسْتَمِرٍّۢ
verses.text: Surely We sent a furious wind against them on a day of the non-stop calamity.

verses.quran_arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍۢ مُّنقَعِرٍۢ
verses.text: It snatched the people away as if they were trunks of uprooted date palms.

verses.quran_arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: How were My punishment and My warnings?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Thamūd called the warnings a lie,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: and said, ‘Shall we follow a single human being from among us? Surely then we would indeed be astray and raving mad.

verses.quran_arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ
verses.text: Has the Reminder been cast (down) on him (alone) among us? No! He is an impudent liar.’

verses.quran_arabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.text: ‘Tomorrow they will know who the impudent liar is!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.text: We are sending the she-camel as a test for them, so watch them and be patient.

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ
verses.text: And inform them that the water is to be divided between them, each drink is to be brought (in turn).’

verses.quran_arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.text: But they called their companion, and he took (a sword) and wounded (her).

verses.quran_arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: How were My punishment and My warnings?

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
verses.text: Surely We sent against them a single cry, and they were like the rubble (used by) the fence maker.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: The people of Lot called the warnings a lie.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٍۢ
verses.text: Surely We sent a sandstorm against them, except for the house(hold) of Lot. We rescued them at dawn

verses.quran_arabic: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.text: – a blessing from Us. In this way We repay the one who is thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Certainly he had warned them of Our attack, and they disputed the warnings.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: Certainly they solicited him for his guest(s), but We obliterated their eyes: ‘Taste My punishment and My warnings!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
verses.text: Certainly in the morning a set punishment came upon them:

verses.quran_arabic: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: ‘Taste My punishment and My warnings!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: Certainly the warnings came to the house of Pharaoh.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
verses.text: They called Our signs a lie – all of it – so We seized them with the seizing of a mighty, powerful (One).

verses.quran_arabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: Are your disbelievers better than those? Or do you have an exemption in the scriptures?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘We shall all be victorious’?

verses.quran_arabic: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.text: They will be routed and turn their back!

verses.quran_arabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.text: Yes! The Hour is their appointed time, and the Hour is grievous and bitter.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍۢ
verses.text: Surely the sinners are astray and raving mad!

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.text: On the Day when they are dragged on their faces into the Fire: ‘Taste the effect of Saqar!’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٍۢ
verses.text: Surely We have created everything in measure,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌۭ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.text: and Our command is but a single (act), like a blink of the eye.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have destroyed your parties (before), yet (is there) anyone who takes heed?

verses.quran_arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍۢ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: Everything they have done is in the scriptures,

verses.quran_arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍۢ وَكَبِيرٍۢ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.text: and every small and great (deed) is inscribed.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَهَرٍۢ
verses.text: Surely the ones who guard (themselves) will be in (the midst of) gardens and a river,

verses.quran_arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.text: in a sure seat in the presence of a powerful King.
